title: Xtra Creamy Brazilian Chicken Skillet
description: A nutty and creamy Brazilian dish featuring cilantro and shio-koji-cure, made in an iron teppan skillet, this recipe is a show-off dish for any occasion, with a blend of flavors that will leave you wanting more.
instructions: Heat the iron teppan skillet over medium high heat and add the olive oil.
Add the chicken to the skillet and cook until browned on all sides and cooked through.
Remove the chicken from the skillet and set aside.
Add the garlic to the skillet and cook for 1 minute.
Add the shio-koji to the skillet and cook for 1 minute.
Add the coconut milk to the skillet and stir to combine with the shio-koji and garlic.
Add the chopped cilantro to the skillet and stir to combine.
Return the chicken to the skillet and stir to combine with the sauce.
Season the chicken and sauce with salt and black pepper.
Serve the chicken and sauce hot over rice or with crusty bread.
